rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL C ROBERTS JR VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 3, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT NIBCO INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 9, 2008. OPPOSING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS ALONG WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL C ROBERTS JR VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 3, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT BUFFALO PUMPS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF IN THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT NEGATE PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE OF WORKING WITH AND AROUND ORIGINAL PUMPS AND PLAINTIFF'S AND COHEN'S DECLARATIONS ALSO CREATE TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. MOTION GRANTED AS TO THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION, NO OPPOSITION FILED. DENIED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES BECAUSE FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. OBJECTIONS TO HORNE DECLARATION SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL C ROBERTS JR VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 3, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT GOULDS PUMPS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF IN THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT NEGATE PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY RE EXPOSURE TO NEW PUMPS. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILS TO COMPLY WITH C.R.C. 3.1350. =(302/PJM)
